final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] command,
    output reg ack
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            ack <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (command != 4'b0000) begin // Assuming 0000 is an invalid command
                ack <= 1;
            end else begin
                ack <= 0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
